metadata.regulatory_mandate: Factories Act Section 88 / OISD standards evidence preservation
metadata.description: Sealed SCADA telemetry and risk factors recording for safety investigation.

factors.name: Explosion Hazard (CH4 Flammability)
factors.details: FLAMMABLE GAS DETECTED: Methane level is 6.8% LFL (Lower Flammable Limit). Explosion risk elevated.

factors.name: Hot Work Flammable Gas Overlap
factors.details: CRITICAL: Active Hot Work (ignition source) in area with 6.8% LFL Methane. High risk of immediate fire/explosion. Violation of OISD-STD-105 Work Permit standards.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.

factors.name: Confined Space Operations
factors.details: Active Confined Space entry. Requires continuous atmospheric monitoring.

factors.name: Hot Work Operations
factors.details: Active welding, grinding or other hot work. Sparks present. Flammable gases must remain < 4% LFL.

factors.name: SIMOPs (Simultaneous Operations) Hazard
factors.details: SIMOPs Conflict: Hot Work (ignition) and Confined Space (toxic hazard) active simultaneously. Increases likelihood of accidents due to team interaction errors.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.

factors.name: Normal Operations (Clean Telemetry)
factors.details: No active hazardous permits, no maintenance, and all sensors reporting green.

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: Normal Operations (Clean Telemetry)
factors.details: No active hazardous permits, no maintenance, and all sensors reporting green.

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: CO Rapid Accumulation Anomaly
factors.details: TEMPORAL HAZARD: Carbon Monoxide is rising rapidly at 7.4 ppm/s. Indication of a process gas leak.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.
